description: Censorship monitor: per-node direct domain checks (job=xray-analyzer-nodes) and VPN proxy availability (job=xray-checker). Shows domain accessibility, block types, DPI detection, TLS health, HTTP codes, proxy latency, and historical trends across all nodes.

spec.description: Number of VPN nodes whose last scan completed successfully.
spec.title: Nodes Online

spec.description: Mean domain-accessibility % across all nodes that have completed a scan. (Bug fix: previous version used `> 0` which silently excluded totally-blocked nodes from the average.)
spec.title: Avg Accessibility

spec.description: Number of unique domains reported as BLOCKED on at least one node.
spec.title: Blocked Domains

spec.description: Unique domains where DPI signatures were detected on at least one node.
spec.title: DPI Detected Domains

spec.description: Number of VPN subscription proxies currently reporting online (latency > 0) via xray-checker.
spec.title: Proxies Online

spec.description: Seconds since the most recent scan completed across all nodes. Orange >10 min, red >30 min.
spec.title: Last Scan Age

spec.description: Unique domains reporting an invalid TLS certificate on at least one node — a typical MITM / TLS-block indicator.
spec.title: TLS Invalid Domains

spec.description: Top 25 domains blocked on the most nodes. Bar length = number of nodes reporting BLOCKED.
spec.title: Most Blocked Domains (node count)

spec.expr: count by (block_type) (xray_domain_accessible{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", status="BLOCKED", block_type!="", instance=~"$node", domain=~"$domain"})

spec.description: Distribution of censorship mechanisms. (Bug fix: BLOCKED bucket now explicitly filters status="BLOCKED" so it no longer overlaps with PARTIAL rows that also carry a block_type.)
spec.title: Block Type Distribution

spec.expr: topk(10, sum by (instance) (xray_domain_accessible{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", instance=~"$node", domain=~"$domain"} == bool 0) > 0)

spec.description: Nodes ranked by number of domains they block, keyed by Prometheus `instance` label (the real node identifier — the `proxy` label is typically just "direct" when nodes scan without a VPN).
spec.title: Most Blocking Nodes

spec.description: BLOCKED and PARTIAL domain × node records (OK entries filtered out to keep this view focused on problems). Use dashboard variables ($node, $domain) to narrow down.
spec.title: Blocked & Partial Domains — Quick View

spec.description: Full domain × node accessibility matrix. Shows ALL statuses (OK, BLOCKED, PARTIAL). Sorted by accessibility ascending (blocked first).
spec.title: Domain × Node Status (all)

spec.description: Current domain accessibility % for each node. Nodes with low % are in heavily censored networks. Node name prefix indicates country (ru=Russia, at=Austria, de=Germany, nl=Netherlands, tr=Turkey…). Now respects the $node variable.
spec.title: Per-Node Accessibility %

spec.description: Domain accessibility % per node over time. Drops indicate censorship events or node outages.
spec.title: Per-Node Accessibility % — Over Time

spec.description: Average domain accessibility % per country group over time. Compare censorship levels between Russia (ru/transit-ru/routing-ru), Austria (at), Germany (de), Netherlands (nl/routing-nl), Turkey (tr), and Sweden/France (se/fr). Divergence between groups reveals country-specific censorship.
spec.title: Accessibility % by Country Group

spec.description: Domain × node combinations where the TLS certificate is reported INVALID. Filtered to invalid-only so this panel surfaces problems only (toggle query to remove `== 0` for full matrix).
spec.title: TLS Invalid — Domain × Node

spec.description: Domain × node combinations with DPI signatures detected. Filtered to DPI-detected-only so this surfaces hits (domain may still be accessible — DPI detection is orthogonal to block status).
spec.title: DPI Detected — Domain × Node

spec.description: All HTTP/HTTPS response codes per domain/node. Code 0 = no response/timeout. Use dashboard variables to narrow down.
spec.title: HTTP Response Codes (all)

spec.description: Aggregate OK / PARTIAL / BLOCKED domain counts across all selected nodes over time. Shows censorship trend at a glance.
spec.title: Accessibility Over Time — OK / PARTIAL / BLOCKED

spec.expr: sum by (block_type) (xray_domain_accessible{job="xray-analyzer-nodes", status="BLOCKED", block_type!="", instance=~"$node", domain=~"$domain"})

spec.description: Blocked-domain count stacked by block_type over time. Shift between buckets (e.g. IP/TCP → TLS/SSL/DPI) signals a change in how censorship is applied.
spec.title: Block Types Over Time

spec.description: Duration of the last scan per node. Outliers indicate slow or overloaded nodes.
spec.title: Scan Duration (per node)

links.title: DPI monitor
links.tooltip: Open DNS / CDN / Telegram DPI probe dashboard

title: Xray Analyzer — Nodes monitor
